filter: Is it safe enough to test?
Does it move the mission forward?

levels.name: Safe Experiment
levels.examples: generate a report; inspect structure; compileall; a docs draft

levels.name: Controlled Prototype
levels.examples: a new CLI command; a validator; a MUD object

levels.name: Approval-Gated
levels.examples: refactor the ritual; rename a make target; alter registry format

levels.name: High-Risk
levels.examples: delete files; rewrite git history; push to GitHub; licenses; schema

levels.name: Blocked
levels.examples: expose secrets; bypass a gate; unlicensed code; claim compliance; hide uncertainty; disable tests; raw shell in the MUD

constraint_review_template: Rules we may bend (habit, not constraint):
